Notice Of Motion For Protective Order
Off Calendar Jan-11-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF JOHN MCINERNEY III'S MOTION FOR PROTECTIVE ORDER. No appearances. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: granted in part, denied in part. Granted as to special interrogatories no. 353-356, which defendant has agreed to withdraw and form interrogatories series 6, 7, and 15. Denied as to special interrogatories 357-359 and form interrogatories series 13. As to the request for production of document, plaintiff only has to respond once - either by responding to the Request for prod. of documents set one prior to plaintiff's deposition or by bringing the requested documents to his deposition. As to all other requests not specifically identified in the moving papers, defendant is ordered to revise his discovery requests and remove all duplicative requests. Thereafter, the parties are to meet and confer to resolve any further issues. Request for sanctions denied as to both parties. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi; Not reported
